name: 2D Platformer
description: Classic side-scrolling platformer with precise jump mechanics, collectibles, and enemies. Features CharacterBody2D-based movement with coyote time, variable jump height, and wall sliding.
features: Tight platformer movement with acceleration and deceleration
Variable jump height (hold to jump higher)
Coyote time for forgiving ledge jumps
Game manager with score, lives, and level restart

coyote_time.description: Seconds after leaving a ledge where jump is still allowed

max_lives.description: Number of lives the player starts with
